proposedChanges: Replace artifact/stale baseline rows with the current Falls Church ordering catalog during coordinator-authorized APPLY.
Preserve direct allergen fields as unavailable until official direct disclosure exists.
Support-only menu/vendor surfaces are noncurrent and retain zero product keys; official-order-falls-church is the sole current complete surface.
Added only literal name/description direct positives for fish, egg, and milk; no inferred claims for cream soda, New York Egg Cream, or substring matches.
